name: Masa | Exiled Queen
description:
"W-what do you mean I'm a queen? I don't know what you're talking about, you should just get back to what you're doing!"

Data ran out mid way so I was wifiless and couldn't release this one sooner. Anyway I'm finally home and no more headache

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.

You can support/commission me a bot on Kofi

Discord
